Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Ccp Section 425.16(C)
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Tyler Rougeau, Esq., (510)301-2493 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Houri Parsi.
Vadim Sidelnikov, Esq., (415)981-5411 of Bledsoe, Diestel, Treppa & Crane LLP of Defendant/Moving party Rosemary Cort Properties, LLC.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ROSEMARY COURT PROPERTIES, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY, THOMAS MCCORMICK Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To CCP Section 425.16(C)IS GRANTED IN FULL. Counsels' hourly rates are at or below market, and California's anti-SLAPP laws are complex. Plaintiff is to pay $10,958.40 in fees and costs to Defendants Rosemary Court Properties, LLC and Thomas McCormick collectively. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
